entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: A cereal grain crop affected by leaf rust.

entities.name: LEAF RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting barley.

entities.name: PUCCINIA HORDEI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes leaf rust in barley.

entities.name: PARTIAL RESISTANCE
entities.description: A quantitative resistance to leaf rust not based on hypersensitivity.

entities.name: HYPERSENSITIVITY
entities.description: A type of plant immune response that partial resistance is not based on.

entities.name: HAUSTORIUM FORMATION
entities.description: The process of fungal nutrient-absorbing organ formation, hampered by partial resistance.

entities.name: LATENCY PERIOD
entities.description: The time between infection and symptom appearance, prolonged by partial resistance.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with a quantitative trait.

entities.name: L94
entities.description: A susceptible barley background line.

entities.name: VADA
entities.description: A barley line used in the mapping population.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to introgress QTL into a specific background.

entities.name: NEAR-ISOGENIC LINES
entities.description: Lines that are genetically identical except for a small specific region.

entities.name: RPHQ2
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus contributing to partial resistance to leaf rust.

entities.name: RPHQ3
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus associated with leaf rust resistance.

entities.name: RPHQ4
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus associated with leaf rust resistance.

entities.name: RESTRICTION FRAGMENT LENGTH POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: A marker-based method used to locate Rphq2.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 2H
entities.description: The chromosome where Rphq2 is located.

entities.name: MAP-BASED CLONING
entities.description: A method used to identify the gene responsible for a trait.

entities.name: SUBNIL
entities.description: A high-resolution version of near-isogenic lines used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: MILLA LOCUS
entities.description: A genetic locus proximal to Rphq2.

entities.name: BULKED SEGREGANT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used for fine-mapping the Rphq2 region.

entities.name: SYNTENY
entities.description: The conservation of blocks of order within two sets of chromosomes, used here with rice.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A crop used for synteny analysis to fine-map Rphq2.

entities.name: RETROTRANSPOSON PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins identified in the rice sequence corresponding to the Rphq2 region.

entities.name: PEROXIDASE PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins identified as candidates for the gene contributing to partial resistance.

entities.name: MAP3K
entities.description: A mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase kinase protein identified as a candidate for partial resistance.
